generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution 3D LiDAR sensor providing point clouds for object detection and tracking. Integrated into the upper-level chassis of the Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "RGB-D depth camera capturing environmental perception data for object tracking. Integrated into the upper-level chassis alongside the LiDAR."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RGBDEnvironmentalData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors monitoring real-time vehicle parameters including speed and steering angle. Integrated into the upper-level chassis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
    base:desc "Raw and processed point cloud data transmitted from LiDAR to the Data Pre-Processing FE via ROS2 topics."
]

instance RGBDEnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iCamera
    base:desc "RGB-D data transmitted from the depth camera to the Data Pre-Processing FE via ROS2 topics."
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) transmitted via ROS2 topics."
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelRealSenseD435iCamera
    base:desc "Structured object tracks generated from clustered point clouds and RGB-D data, transmitted to the DTE via Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (DBSCAN) algorithm implemented in the Data Pre-Processing FE for point cloud clustering."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for tracking detected objects in the Data Pre-Processing FE."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) control model following ISO 15622 performance class I, computing desired speed based on lead vehicle distance."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllingFunctionalEntity
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time data including ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and object tracks transmitted from the PTE to DTE."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData, ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFunctionalEntity, ACCControllingFunctionalEntity
]

instance HistoricalSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical time-series data stored in SQL database for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimeSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingFunctionalEntity
]

instance SimulatedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated data generated via MATLAB/Simulink for closed-loop ACC algorithm validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControllingFunctionalEntity
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) providing modular communication and node lifecycle management for intra-vehicle communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, CyberPhysicalExperimentationService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for Jetson hardware development and deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity, ActuationFunctionalEntity
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 used for rapid prototyping of ROS2 nodes and data processing scripts."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFunctionalEntity, ThreeDVisualizationFunctionalEntity
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ used for performance-critical ROS2 nodes and real-time processing."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControllingFunctionalEntity, ActuationFunctionalEntity
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink used for complex system modeling and simulation-based validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables CyberPhysicalExperimentationService
]

instance DataTranslationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation FE handling serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment between ROS2 and external systems."
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External SQL database for storing historical sensor data and generating reports."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance WiFiCommunicationProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP) protocol for inter-entity communication between PT and DTE."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization User Interface FE."
    DTDFVocab:provides EgoVehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight, DrivingPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading of ACC Controlling FE (ISO 15622 performance class I) from PT to DTE to reduce computational burden on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceInsight, ComputationalLoadReductionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enabling/disabling of ACC, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking via Control Panel User Interface FE."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data."
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight, PerformanceAnalyticsInsight
]

instance CyberPhysicalExperimentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based validation of ACC algorithms using MATLAB/Simulink and ROS2 for closed-loop testing."
    DTDFVocab:provides AlgorithmValidationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EgoVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ego vehicle speed and steering angle for performance assessment."
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected objects and their tracks in proximity to the vehicle."
]

instance DrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projection of the vehicle's intended driving path based on current state and object tracks."
]

instance ACCPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance analytics of ACC system based on real-time and historical data."
]

instance ComputationalLoadReductionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Reduction of computational load on onboard Jetson Orin Nano by offloading ACC computations to DTE."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enabling/disabling of ACC and adjustment of desired speed via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of unexpected behavior such as sudden braking or sensor failures through data monitoring."
]

instance PerformanceAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical analysis of vehicle performance metrics including speed, steering, and object interactions."
]

instance AlgorithmValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results of ACC algorithms through simulation-based testing in closed-loop environments."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller. Integrated into lower-level chassis."
]

instance SteeringServoActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls vehicle steering angle based on commands from Digital Twin Entity. Integrated into lower-level chassis."
]

// C1: Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts PT-specific functionality including data pre-processing, actuation, and sensor interfacing. Deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano onboard the vehicle."
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts ACC computation, data storage, and report generation. Deployed on external cloud/edge server for computation offloading."
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Workstation for 3D visualization and remote control connected via Wi-Fi to the DTE."
]

instance DataPreProcessingFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Pre-processes raw sensor data including point cloud clustering (DBSCAN) and object tracking (Kalman filter)."
]

instance ActuationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Triggers motor and steering servo actuation based on commands from the DTE."
]

instance ACCControllingFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 performance class I ACC algorithm for computing desired speed."
]

instance ReportingFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports from historical sensor data stored in SQL database."
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Renders real-time object tracks and vehicle state in a virtual cockpit using ROS2 topics."
]

instance ControlPanelFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Provides remote management interface for ACC enabling/disabling and parameter adjustment."
]

// Environment
instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world include:
  - **Desired speed commands**: Computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the DTE and sent back to the PT for actuation.
  - **Remote management commands**: User-triggered actions such as **enabling/disabling ACC**, **modifying desired speed**, and **emergency braking**, transmitted via the **Control Panel User Interface FE** to the **Actuation FE** in the PTE.
  - **Actuation commands**: Converted into motor voltage and steering servo signals by the **Actuation FE** in the PTE, executed on the **Vedder ESC** and steering servo."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time time-scale** with the following constraints:
  - **End-to-end latency**: ≤ **100 ms** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication) between the PT and DTE to ensure real-time ACC functionality.
  - **Clock synchronization**: Devices must be synchronized to an accuracy of **±100 ms** to maintain event ordering and data integrity in distributed operations.
  - **Perception cycle**: Object tracks and vehicle state are updated at the **LiDAR scan rate** (typically **10 Hz** for the Hokuyo UST-10LX) and processed in real-time by the DTE."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as follows:
  - **Entities**:
    1. **Physical Twin Entity (PTE)**: Hosts **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering servo)**, and **data pre-processing** (point cloud clustering/tracking).
    2. **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Hosts **ACC computation**, **data storage (SQL)**, **report generation**, and **visualization pre-processing**.
    3. **User Entity (UE)**: Provides **3D visualization** and **remote control** interfaces.
  - **Communication**:
    - **Intra-vehicle**: ROS2 topics for PTE components.
    - **Inter-entity**: Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP) between PTE, DTE, and UE.
  - **Deployment**:
    - PTE: Onboard **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano**.
    - DTE: External cloud/edge server.
    - UE: Separate workstation with **3D visualization** and **control panel**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle phases of the PT:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for validating ACC algorithms via **MATLAB/Simulink** and **ROS2** simulations.
  - **Development Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **computation offloading**, and **remote management** during system integration and testing.
  - **Operation Phase**: Supports **health monitoring**, **predictive maintenance**, and **fleet optimization** by collecting and analyzing vehicle state data.
  The DT represents the PT **as operated**, with real-time synchronization between the virtual and physical systems."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Achieved via **≤100 ms latency** and **±100 ms clock synchronization** to maintain temporal alignment between PT and DT.
  - **Model validation**: ACC algorithms are validated against **ISO 15622** standards and tested in **closed-loop simulations** using **MATLAB/Simulink**.
  - **Data integrity**: Ensured by the **Data Translation FE**, which performs **unit conversion**, **message alignment**, and **error checking**.
  - **Uncertainty management**: Object tracks are refined using **Kalman filters**, and sensor data is cross-validated between **LiDAR** and **camera** inputs.
  - **Verification**: End-to-end testing includes **latency measurements**, **actuation accuracy**, and **remote command reliability**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the PT and DT includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)** for inter-entity communication, with **ROS2 topics** for intra-vehicle communication.
  - **Latency Requirements**: **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185) to support real-time ACC operations.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices synchronized to **±100 ms accuracy** to ensure event ordering and data consistency.
  - **Data Translation**: Custom **Data Translation FE** handles **serialization**, **unit conversion**, and **message alignment** between ROS2 and external systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across multiple hardware components:
  - **Physical Twin Entity (PTE)**: Deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** onboard the PT, running **ROS2 nodes** for sensor interfacing and actuation.
  - **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Hosted on an **external cloud/edge server**, executing **ACC computation**, **data storage (SQL)**, and **report generation**.
  - **User Entity (UE)**: Deployed on a **separate workstation** with a **3D visualization** interface (e.g., Unity or custom OpenGL) and **control panel** for remote management.
  The system uses **ROS2** for modular communication and **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity connectivity."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is enabled through: **(1) Standardized Interfaces** – **R1** mandates **modular, loosely coupled components** with **standardized communication** (e.g., ROS2, Wi-Fi). **(2) External Data Storage** – **R3** requires data to be stored in an **SQL database** external to the vehicle, enabling integration with **fleet management platforms** or **enterprise systems** (implied by **Abstract**). **(3) Data Translation FE** – Supports interoperability with external systems via **message serialization** and **protocol alignment**. **(4) Potential Extensions** – The architecture could integrate with **V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) systems** or **cloud-based analytics** (as suggested by **Section II.B** for broader automotive DT applications). Specific integrations are not detailed in the case study."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for **Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework**, adapted for automotive use with deviations (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity**, split **User Interface FE**).
  - **ISO 15622**: Standard for **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC)**, implemented as performance class I.
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Latency requirements for **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication** (≤100 ms).
  - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for **robotics and autonomous systems**.
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Potential use for **Data Translation FE** (though not explicitly implemented in this case study)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety and security are addressed through:
    - **Real-Time Constraints**: **≤100 ms latency** and **±100 ms clock synchronization** ensure timely and coordinated operations, critical for **safety-critical systems** like ACC.
    - **ISO 15622 Compliance**: The ACC logic adheres to **performance class I** standards, including **emergency braking** functionality to prevent collisions.
    - **Modular Design**: The **entity-based architecture** isolates critical functions (e.g., actuation) from non-critical components, reducing single points of failure.
    The document does not specify **cybersecurity measures** (e.g., encryption, access control) or **hardware redundancy**, though the **remote management** feature includes **emergency braking** as a safety mechanism."
]
